prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约4504→3351→3130→3636，近3年整体前移后2025年略有后移约500名；2025年基准位次约3636名；本省理科计划2022年87人、2023年89人、2024年91人、2025年88人；2026年计划88人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第21名，近年排名稳定在Top20–30区间；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及学术不端与师德师风事件（院长论文造假等），可能对报考热度产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第36（较热），关注度中等；2022年曾在河南出现投档断档，对报考心理有滞后影响；拥有14个A-及以上学科，包括化学A+、工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、数学A+、统计学A等，与招生专业（理科试验班数学与大数据、金融学类、工科试验班信息科学与技术等）高度关联，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业为高热推荐，与南开工科试验班方向匹配；金融/财经/经济分化观望；本省2026年物理类考生约32.9万人（按2025年比例估算），较2025年增加约15.5%，竞争加剧；南开大学位于天津，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在四川招生占比约2.3%（2025年），属中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年略有后移、招生计划持平、本省物理类考生大幅增加（竞争加剧）以及学校声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考热度，在2025年基准3636名基础上预计位次略有后移；预测最低位次约3686名，区间3266–4106名。

- 理科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（八里台校区）
- 工科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（津南校区）
- 金融学类（津南校区）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 4504 → 3351 → 3130 → 3636. Over the past three years, the ranking generally moved forward, but in 2025 it slightly moved back by about 500 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3636. The provincial science enrollment plan was 87 in 2022, 89 in 2023, 91 in 2024, and 88 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 88, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 21st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the Top 20–30 range in recent years. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents (e.g., dean's paper fraud), which may suppress application enthusiasm to some extent. Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot), with moderate attention. In 2022, there was a filing gap in Henan, which has a lagging psychological impact on applications. It has 14 A- or above disciplines, including Chemistry A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Mathematics A+, and Statistics A, which are highly relevant to the enrollment majors (e.g., Science Experimental Class in Mathematics and Big Data, Finance, Engineering Experimental Class in Information Science and Technology), strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors are highly recommended, matching Nankai's Engineering Experimental Class direction. Finance/Economics/Economy is in a wait-and-see divergence. The number of physics category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 329,000 (estimated based on the 2025 ratio), an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a provincial university, with no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2.3% (2025), at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight backward movement in historical rankings in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan, significant increase in provincial physics category candidates (intensified competition), and negative school reputation incidents that may suppress some application enthusiasm, the ranking is expected to slightly move back based on the 2025 baseline of 3636. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3686, with a range of 3266–4106.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) (Bali Tai Campus)
- Science Experimental Class (Excellent Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Bali Tai Campus)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellent Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Jinnan Campus)
- Finance (Jinnan Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics (Bali Tai Campus)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) (Jinnan Campus)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (Jinnan Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Science and Sustainable Development) (Bali Tai Campus/Jinnan Campus)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) (Bali Tai Campus/Jinnan Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3266–4106, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction (Economics, Engineering Experimental Class in Information Science and Technology), use Tier 1 (Mathematics and Big Data, Finance, Boling Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 (Material Science and Sustainable Development, Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3266), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 416 → 503 → 464 → 452, with overall small fluctuations and stability in the 450–500 range in the past three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 452; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 29 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 49 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 38, a reduction of 11 (-22.4%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that theoretically lowers the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 21st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the Top 20–30 range in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents, which may suppress application enthusiasm to some extent; Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), with moderate attention; in 2022, there was a filing gap in Henan, which has a lagging effect on application psychology; it has Chinese Language and Literature A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, World History A, Chinese History A, etc., which highly match the liberal arts admission majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Economics, Finance, Law, etc.), attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is cautiously recommended, Finance/Economics is cautiously recommended, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; the number of history category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 206,000 (estimated based on the 2025 proportion), an increase of about 15.8% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a local university, with no local admission preference; its enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2.3% (2025), which is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant reduction in enrollment plan (-22.4%) lowering the admission threshold, the increase in history category candidates in the province intensifying competition, and the negative reputation events possibly suppressing enthusiasm, the reduction effect is slightly stronger than the competition intensification effect; based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 452, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 361, with a range of 311–411.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 311–411, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Chinese Language and Literature) as the main direction, Tier 1 (Finance, Law, Economics) as a sprint, and Tier 3 (Business Administration, Public Administration) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<311), you can focus on sprinting for the top-tier flagship majors.
